nodes.recentposition: Peer Consultant at SSARC in Irvine, CA
nodes.involvements: Alpha Phi Omega, ASUCI, SSARC, UCI Counseling Center, Sacramento Internship Program, UCI Wind Ensemble, Anteater Band
nodes.bios: Hello! My name is Alina Tu, and I initiated in the fall quarter of my third year at UCI. In my free time, I enjoy traveling, hiking, rock climbing, hand-lettering, volunteering, and jamming out to music! A fun fact about myself is that I love the performing arts. Ask me about my study abroad experience at recruitment!
